hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE "\"file_path\"\s*:\s*\"[^\"]+\"" | sed -E "s/.*\"([^\"]+)\"$/\1/"); case "$FILE" in *.cs) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && dotnet format --include "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1) || true ;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE "\"file_path\"\s*:\s*\"[^\"]+\"" | sed -E "s/.*\"([^\"]+)\"$/\1/"); case "$FILE" in *ReMarkets.CustomerPortal.Client/*.ts|*ReMarkets.CustomerPortal.Client/*.tsx|*ReMarkets.CustomerPortal.Client/*.js|*ReMarkets.CustomerPortal.Client/*.jsx) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/src/ReMarkets.CustomerPortal.Client" && npx --no-install prettier --write "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1) || true ;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE "\"command\"\s*:\s*\"[^\"]+\"" | sed -E "s/.*\"([^\"]+)\"$/\1/"); case "$CMD" in *appsettings.PRD.json*|*appsettings.Production.json*|*"database update"*--*[Pp]roduction*) echo "Blocked: command targets production configuration. Ask the user to confirm and run manually." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; exit 0'
